description: Agent-native messaging API for chats, messages, attachments, phone numbers, contact cards, capability checks, and webhooks

novel_features.name: Encrypted local mirror
novel_features.description: Caches Linq chats and messages in an encrypted local mirror with searchable text redacted.

novel_features.name: Generic rich message composer
novel_features.description: Builds the documented nested message body for generic Linq text, media, rich links, replies, preferred service, idempotency, effects, and text decorations with shared validation.

novel_features.name: Protocol-aware typing and effects
novel_features.description: Adds bounded typing indicators plus iMessage effect and decoration discovery for generic Linq chats.

novel_features.name: Webhook subscription operations
novel_features.description: Wraps webhook subscription management with event-catalog validation, safe read-modify-write event updates, and drift checks for inbound events such as typing indicators.

novel_features.name: Channel capability check
novel_features.description: Resolves addresses to iMessage, RCS, or SMS and reports typing, effects, read-receipt, and rich-message feature support without echoing full addresses.

novel_features.name: Attachment lifecycle workflow
novel_features.description: Plans direct URL versus pre-upload paths, enforces HTTPS and size limits, sends media parts, explains persistent/ephemeral lifecycle, and exposes cleanup.

novel_features.name: Rich link preview workflow
novel_features.description: Audits link-only preview rules, blocks first-outbound link openers, sends rich preview parts, and checks Open Graph/Twitter/title/image metadata.

novel_features.name: Reaction workflow
novel_features.description: Wraps built-in and custom reactions with validation, part-index support, and outbound sticker blocking.

novel_features.name: Contact-share workflow
novel_features.description: Preflights native iMessage Name and Photo Sharing by checking contact card readiness, local prior-outbound evidence when available, and once-per-day prompt behavior.
